summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cash Piloting Dashboard data integrity rules and UI components. Backend APIs working perfectly with 97.7% success rate. Frontend UI functional with proper parent/child flow grouping, entity filtering, and KPI indicators.

ui_bugs.issue: Dropdown option clicks occasionally fail due to overlay interception
ui_bugs.selector: Select dropdowns in Quick Add form

console_warnings.issue: Chart width/height warnings (-1) during initial render

passed_tests: Cash flow batch creation with recurrence inheritance
Parent update propagation to children (recurrence, certainty, amount)
Dynamic percentage calculation from parent flows
Delete options (orphan vs delete all linked flows)
KPI cards with first danger month indicators
Entry Log with parent/child flow grouping
Search and filter functionality in Entry Log
